experiment.name: COLORGREEN
experiment.description: An RPVP experiment on structural priming.

text.setup: Please be patient as we set up the experiment...
text.practice:
Welcome to the practice session! 

This is a matching task between two strings of words. 
They will be presented one after the other. 

Your task is to determine if the two strings of words are identical or different from one another.
 The differences may be small, so please pay careful attention.

 Press '1' with your MIDDLE FINGER if they are DIFFERENT, 
Press '2' with your INDEX FINGER if they are the SAME. 

This practice session will be brief.
 When you are ready, press either '1' or '2' to continue.
text.instructions:
Welcome to the experiment! 

This is a matching task between two strings of words. 
They will be presented one after the other. 

Your task is to determine if the two strings of words are identical or different from one another. 
The differences may be small, so please pay careful attention. 

Press '1' with your MIDDLE FINGER if they are DIFFERENT, 
Press '2' with your INDEX FINGER if they are the SAME. 

The experiment will take approximately 30 minutes, divided into multiple blocks. 
You will be able to take breaks between blocks. 

When you are ready, press either '1' or '2' to continue.
text.end:
The experiment is now over! 

Thank you for your participation! 
Please keep still while we save the recording...
